title: PICK OF THE LITTER THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: FRIENDS OF LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMALS PICK OF THE LITTER THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Thrift store whose proceeds benefit domesticated animals in Lincoln County, both those housed at the Lincoln County Animal Shelter and those living in community households. Accepts donations of clean and working small kitchen appliances, bedding or linen, toys/games, books clothing, kitchenware and other small household items. 558 NE 1st Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Friday-Saturday 10am-4pm Donations: Thursday-Saturday 10am-3:30pm Email (541) 574-1861 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 574-1861 Main phone Pick of the Litter Thrift Store (541) 961-5852 Main phone FOLCAS Organization Number Main phone (541) 574-1861 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, Call ahead for current donation information. FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lincoln County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: NE First and Fogarty in Newport, across Hwy 20 from Les Schwab, behind Enterprise Rent-a-Car, in the building with the colorful dog & cat mural. Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Kitchenware Donation Programs Thrift Shops Toy/Game Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FRIENDS OF LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMALS
